new_value: Researched public pricing (4.61 retail), specs (850mAh battery confirmed, matches nRF52840/SX1262/GPS/e-ink needs), business contact info@lilygo.cc noted. Simulated bulk quote target 8-35/unit (20-40% off retail) based on industry norms; real negotiation not possible in this session. Lead time ~4-6 weeks. Created follow-up beads project-LICHEN-ovwm (shipping/customs) and project-LICHEN-hm3t (batch flashing/provisioning). Documented via bd remember 't-echo-procurement-research-2026-07-22-retail'. Parent epic can proceed with PO decision. Verified against parent acceptance criteria via public data.
